productFunnel.ctaSignal: n/a — free product, no billing conversion (accepted exception)
productFunnel.activationSignal: Clerk sign-in events on /auth (Clerk dashboard — not queried here)
productFunnel.returnSignal: daily_brief_snapshots daily refresh (queried below if API reachable)

api.reason: API_BASE or ADMIN_TOKEN not set — cannot query live API

costProvider.reason: no llm_runs aggregate available (API unreachable or no runs in window)

dataDurability.note: Operator must back up D1 before destructive actions on non-reconstructable tables (delivery_*, watchlists_*).

jobFreshness.reason: lifecycle table ingest_runs requires D1 query (API_BASE/ADMIN_TOKEN not used for per-job freshness in this snapshot)
lifecycle table signals (review_status, published_at) requires D1 query (API_BASE/ADMIN_TOKEN not used for per-job freshness in this snapshot)
lifecycle table market_quotes requires D1 query (API_BASE/ADMIN_TOKEN not used for per-job freshness in this snapshot)
lifecycle table score_runs requires D1 query (API_BASE/ADMIN_TOKEN not used for per-job freshness in this snapshot)
lifecycle table d2c_niche_snapshots, d2c_agent_visibility requires D1 query (API_BASE/ADMIN_TOKEN not used for per-job freshness in this snapshot)
lifecycle table daily_brief_snapshots, delivery_log requires D1 query (API_BASE/ADMIN_TOKEN not used for per-job freshness in this snapshot)

deployment.note: Git commit sha on main is the deployment revision evidence. Cloudflare worker revision id is the live probe (not queried here).

actionPolicy.policy: Foundry MAY run registry-approved idempotent retries and prepare tasks/PRs. Foundry MUST NOT change editorial claims, ranking, sources, rate limits, data schemas, or production deployment without explicit human approval.
